interface: Atlas Administration API v2 — Project IP Access List resource
auth: Authorization: Bearer <service-account access token>; errors are application/json

list.response: {results: [NetworkPermissionEntry], links: [{href, rel: self|next|previous}], totalCount}; rel=next omitted on the last page

add.body: a JSON ARRAY of NetworkPermissionEntry objects; each entry sets exactly one of ipAddress | cidrBlock | awsSecurityGroup, plus optional comment (<= 80 chars) and deleteAfterDate
add.success: 200 with the paginated current access list
add.concurrency: the endpoint doesn't support concurrent POST requests — multiple POSTs must be submitted synchronously; batching all missing entries into ONE array-bodied POST is the documented-safe shape

status.entry_value_encoding: the CIDR slash must be percent-encoded (%2F) in the path, e.g. 198.51.100.0%2F24; bare IPs and sg-... ids embed verbatim

semantics.PENDING: Atlas has started to add the entry; it may not yet apply to all cloud providers
semantics.ACTIVE: the entry applies to all relevant cloud providers
semantics.FAILED: Atlas didn't succeed in adding the entry — terminal

duplicate_semantics.behavior: POSTing a value that already exists on the list is absorbed idempotently (success, no second entry); the documented error set for this POST contains no 409 Conflict. Reconcilers therefore compute the missing set by paging + normalizing, not by probing for conflicts.
duplicate_semantics.catalog_note: This corrects the internal catalog line that assumed '409 duplicates' for this resource.

rate_limiting.headers: Retry-After (seconds, only on 429); RateLimit-Limit / RateLimit-Remaining may appear and may be absent
rate_limiting.guidance: wait at least Retry-After before retrying, then back off further if it repeats

normalization_fixture_rules.ip_equals_slash32: an ipAddress equals its /32 cidrBlock twin
normalization_fixture_rules.trim: values are compared after trimming surrounding whitespace
normalization_fixture_rules.case: awsSecurityGroup ids compare case-insensitively and are sent lowercase
normalization_fixture_rules.report_value: bare IP for ipAddress entries, the CIDR string for cidrBlock entries, the lowercase sg id for awsSecurityGroup entries
